---
title: "Enterprise Linux Administration"
format:
  html:
    css: linux-styles.css
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
        <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
        <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;700&family=Syne:wght@400;700;800&family=Geist:wght@300;400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<style>
/* ============================================================
   LINUX COURSE PAGE — Terminal Dark Aesthetic
   ============================================================ */

:root {
  --bg-void:      #080c0a;
  --bg-surface:   #0d1410;
  --bg-card:      #111a14;
  --bg-card-hover:#162019;
  --green-dim:    #1a7a3c;
  --green-core:   #22c55e;
  --green-bright: #4ade80;
  --green-glow:   rgba(34,197,94,0.18);
  --red-rhel:     #e11d48;
  --red-dim:      rgba(225,29,72,0.15);
  --amber:        #f59e0b;
  --text-primary: #e2f0e8;
  --text-muted:   #6b8f74;
  --text-dim:     #3d5c44;
  --border:       rgba(34,197,94,0.12);
  --border-bright:rgba(34,197,94,0.35);
  --font-mono:    'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
  --font-display: 'Syne', sans-serif;
  --font-body:    'Geist', sans-serif;
}

/* Reset page chrome */
body { background: var(--bg-void) !important; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
#quarto-content { padding: 0 !important; }
.page-layout-full #quarto-content { max-width: 100%; }
nav.navbar, footer, .quarto-title-banner { display: none !important; }

/* ── SCANLINE OVERLAY ── */
.linux-page::before {
  content: '';
  position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: 0; pointer-events: none;
  background: repeating-linear-gradient(
    0deg,
    transparent,
    transparent 2px,
    rgba(0,0,0,0.06) 2px,
    rgba(0,0,0,0.06) 4px
  );
}

/* ── HERO ── */
.hero {
  position: relative; overflow: hidden;
  min-height: 100vh;
  display: flex; flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: center; align-items: flex-start;
  padding: clamp(3rem,8vw,7rem) clamp(1.5rem,6vw,7rem);
  background:
    radial-gradient(ellipse 70% 60% at 70% 40%, rgba(34,197,94,0.06) 0%, transparent 70%),
    radial-gradient(ellipse 40% 50% at 20% 80%, rgba(225,29,72,0.05) 0%, transparent 60%),
    var(--bg-void);
}

/* grid lines in hero */
.hero::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute; inset: 0; pointer-events: none;
  background-image:
    linear-gradient(var(--border) 1px, transparent 1px),
    linear-gradient(90deg, var(--border) 1px, transparent 1px);
  background-size: 60px 60px;
  mask-image: radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 80% at 50% 50%, black 30%, transparent 100%);
}

.hero-eyebrow {
  font-family: var(--font-mono);
  font-size: .72rem; letter-spacing: .2em; text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--green-core); margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: .7rem;
}
.hero-eyebrow::before {
  content: '';
  display: inline-block; width: 30px; height: 1px;
  background: var(--green-core);
}

.hero h1 {
  font-family: var(--font-display) !important;
  font-size: clamp(2.8rem, 7vw, 6rem) !important;
  font-weight: 800 !important;
  line-height: 1.02 !important;
  color: var(--text-primary) !important;
  margin: 0 0 .3em !important; max-width: 14ch;
  letter-spacing: -.02em;
}

.hero h1 .accent { color: var(--green-core); }
.hero h1 .rhel   { color: var(--red-rhel); }

.hero-sub {
  font-family: var(--font-body);
  font-size: clamp(1rem, 1.8vw, 1.2rem);
  color: var(--text-muted); max-width: 52ch;
  line-height: 1.65; margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
}

/* terminal prompt animation */
.terminal-prompt {
  font-family: var(--font-mono);
  font-size: .88rem;
  color: var(--text-muted);
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: .5rem;
  margin-bottom: 3rem;
}
.prompt-user  { color: var(--green-bright); }
.prompt-host  { color: var(--amber); }
.prompt-path  { color: var(--text-muted); }
.prompt-cmd   { color: var(--text-primary); }
.cursor {
  display: inline-block; width: 9px; height: 1.1em;
  background: var(--green-core);
  animation: blink 1.1s step-end infinite;
  vertical-align: text-bottom; margin-left: 2px;
}
@keyframes blink { 50% { opacity: 0; } }

.hero-cta {
  display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 1rem; align-items: center;
  position: relative; z-index: 2;
}

.btn-enroll {
  font-family: var(--font-mono);
  font-size: .88rem; letter-spacing: .05em;
  color: var(--bg-void) !important;
  background: var(--green-core);
  padding: .85rem 2.2rem;
  border: none; border-radius: 3px;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  transition: all .2s ease;
  box-shadow: 0 0 24px rgba(34,197,94,.3);
  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: .5rem;
}
.btn-enroll:hover {
  background: var(--green-bright);
  box-shadow: 0 0 40px rgba(34,197,94,.5);
  transform: translateY(-2px);
}
.btn-enroll::before { content: '$ '; opacity: .6; }

.btn-outline {
  font-family: var(--font-mono);
  font-size: .88rem; letter-spacing: .05em;
  color: var(--green-core) !important;
  background: transparent;
  padding: .85rem 2rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--border-bright); border-radius: 3px;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  transition: all .2s ease;
}
.btn-outline:hover {
  background: var(--green-glow);
  border-color: var(--green-core);
}

/* floating stat chips */
.hero-stats {
  position: absolute; right: clamp(2rem,6vw,6rem); top: 50%;
  transform: translateY(-50%);
  display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1.1rem;
  z-index: 2;
}
@media(max-width:900px) { .hero-stats { display: none; } }

.stat-chip {
  background: var(--bg-card);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-left: 3px solid var(--green-core);
  padding: 1rem 1.4rem;
  border-radius: 4px;
  min-width: 170px;
  backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
  animation: floatIn .6s ease both;
}
.stat-chip:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: .15s; border-left-color: var(--amber); }
.stat-chip:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: .3s;  border-left-color: var(--red-rhel); }

@keyframes floatIn {
  from { opacity: 0; transform: translateX(30px); }
  to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(0); }
}

.stat-num {
  font-family: var(--font-display);
  font-size: 1.8rem; font-weight: 800;
  color: var(--text-primary); display: block; line-height: 1;
}
.stat-label {
  font-family: var(--font-mono);
  font-size: .68rem; color: var(--text-muted);
  text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .15em;
  margin-top: .3rem; display: block;
}

/* ── SECTION WRAPPER ── */
.section-wrap {
  padding: clamp(4rem,8vw,7rem) clamp(1.5rem,6vw,7rem);
  position: relative; z-index: 1;
}

/* ── SECTION LABEL ── */
.section-label {
  font-family: var(--font-mono);
  font-size: .7rem; letter-spacing: .25em; text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--green-dim); margin-bottom: 1rem;
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: .6rem;
}
.section-label::after {
  content: '';
  flex: 1; max-width: 60px; height: 1px;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--green-dim), transparent);
}

/* ── SECTION HEADING ── */
.section-heading {
  font-family: var(--font-display) !important;
  font-size: clamp(1.8rem,4vw,3rem) !important;
  font-weight: 800 !important;
  color: var(--text-primary) !important;
  margin: 0 0 .5rem !important;
  letter-spacing: -.02em;
}
.section-sub {
  font-family: var(--font-body);
  font-size: 1.05rem; color: var(--text-muted);
  max-width: 60ch; line-height: 1.6;
  margin-bottom: 3.5rem;
}

/* ── MODULES GRID ── */
.modules-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr));
  gap: 1.5px;
  background: var(--border);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 6px; overflow: hidden;
}

.module-card {
  background: var(--bg-card);
  padding: 2.5rem;
  position: relative; overflow: hidden;
  transition: background .25s ease;
  cursor: default;
}
.module-card:hover { background: var(--bg-card-hover); }

.module-card::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 2px;
  background: var(--card-accent, var(--green-core));
  transform: scaleX(0); transform-origin: left;
  transition: transform .35s ease;
}
.module-card:hover::before { transform: scaleX(1); }

.module-card.mod-1 { --card-accent: var(--green-core); }
.module-card.mod-2 { --card-accent: var(--red-rhel); }
.module-card.mod-3 { --card-accent: var(--amber); }
.module-card.mod-4 { --card-accent: #38bdf8; }

/* module number watermark */
.module-card::after {
  content: attr(data-num);
  position: absolute; bottom: -10px; right: 10px;
  font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 5rem; font-weight: 800;
  color: rgba(34,197,94,.04); line-height: 1; pointer-events: none;
  user-select: none;
}

.mod-icon {
  width: 44px; height: 44px;
  background: var(--green-glow);
  border: 1px solid var(--border-bright);
  border-radius: 6px;
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  font-size: 1.3rem; margin-bottom: 1.4rem;
  position: relative; z-index: 1;
}
.module-card.mod-2 .mod-icon { background: var(--red-dim); border-color: rgba(225,29,72,.3); }
.module-card.mod-3 .mod-icon { background: rgba(245,158,11,.1); border-color: rgba(245,158,11,.25); }
.module-card.mod-4 .mod-icon { background: rgba(56,189,248,.08); border-color: rgba(56,189,248,.2); }

.mod-tag {
  font-family: var(--font-mono);
  font-size: .65rem; letter-spacing: .18em; text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--green-core); margin-bottom: .6rem; display: block;
}
.module-card.mod-2 .mod-tag { color: var(--red-rhel); }
.module-card.mod-3 .mod-tag { color: var(--amber); }
.module-card.mod-4 .mod-tag { color: #38bdf8; }

.mod-title {
  font-family: var(--font-display);
  font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--text-primary); margin-bottom: .8rem;
  line-height: 1.2;
}
.mod-desc {
  font-family: var(--font-body);
  font-size: .92rem; color: var(--text-muted);
  line-height: 1.65;
}

.mod-topics {
  margin-top: 1.4rem; display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: .4rem;
}
.mod-topic {
  font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: .68rem;
  color: var(--text-dim); background: rgba(255,255,255,.03);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06);
  padding: .2rem .55rem; border-radius: 2px;
  transition: color .2s, border-color .2s;
}
.module-card:hover .mod-topic {
  color: var(--green-core);
  border-color: var(--border-bright);
}

/* ── LEARNING PATH ── */
.path-section {
  background: var(--bg-surface);
  border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
}

.path-timeline {
  display: flex; flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0; max-width: 750px;
}

.path-step {
  display: flex; gap: 2rem; padding: 2rem 0;
  border-bottom: 1px dashed var(--border);
  position: relative;
  opacity: 0;
  animation: stepIn .5s ease forwards;
}
.path-step:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
.path-step:nth-child(1) { animation-delay: .1s; }
.path-step:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: .2s; }
.path-step:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: .3s; }
.path-step:nth-child(4) { animation-delay: .4s; }
.path-step:nth-child(5) { animation-delay: .5s; }

@keyframes stepIn {
  from { opacity: 0; transform: translateX(-20px); }
  to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(0); }
}

.step-num {
  font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: .7rem;
  color: var(--text-dim); flex-shrink: 0;
  padding-top: .15rem;
  letter-spacing: .08em;
}

.step-connector {
  display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.step-dot {
  width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 50%;
  background: var(--green-core);
  box-shadow: 0 0 10px var(--green-core);
  flex-shrink: 0; margin-top: .25rem;
}
.path-step.step-cert .step-dot {
  background: var(--amber);
  box-shadow: 0 0 10px var(--amber);
}

.step-body { flex: 1; }
.step-title {
  font-family: var(--font-display);
  font-size: 1.05rem; font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--text-primary); margin-bottom: .35rem;
}
.step-detail {
  font-family: var(--font-body);
  font-size: .88rem; color: var(--text-muted); line-height: 1.6;
}
.step-duration {
  font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: .68rem;
  color: var(--green-dim); margin-top: .5rem; letter-spacing: .1em;
}
.path-step.step-cert .step-duration { color: var(--amber); }

/* ── TOOLS STRIP ── */
.tools-strip {
  background: var(--bg-void);
  padding: 3rem clamp(1.5rem,6vw,7rem);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
}

.tools-label {
  font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: .7rem;
  letter-spacing: .2em; text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--text-dim); margin-bottom: 1.6rem;
  text-align: center;
}

.tools-row {
  display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: .8rem; justify-content: center;
}

.tool-pill {
  font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: .78rem;
  color: var(--text-muted);
  padding: .45rem 1rem;
  background: var(--bg-card);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 100px;
  transition: all .2s ease;
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: .4rem;
}
.tool-pill:hover {
  color: var(--green-core);
  border-color: var(--border-bright);
  background: var(--green-glow);
  transform: translateY(-2px);
}
.tool-pill .dot {
  width: 5px; height: 5px; border-radius: 50%;
  background: var(--green-core); opacity: .6;
}

/* ── CTA SECTION ── */
.cta-section {
  padding: clamp(4rem,8vw,7rem) clamp(1.5rem,6vw,7rem);
  position: relative; overflow: hidden;
  text-align: center;
  background:
    radial-gradient(ellipse 60% 70% at 50% 50%, rgba(34,197,94,0.07) 0%, transparent 70%),
    var(--bg-void);
}

.cta-section::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute; inset: 0; pointer-events: none;
  background-image:
    linear-gradient(var(--border) 1px, transparent 1px),
    linear-gradient(90deg, var(--border) 1px, transparent 1px);
  background-size: 40px 40px;
  mask-image: radial-gradient(ellipse 70% 80% at 50% 50%, black 0%, transparent 100%);
}

.cta-badge {
  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: .5rem;
  font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: .7rem;
  color: var(--green-core); letter-spacing: .15em; text-transform: uppercase;
  background: var(--green-glow); border: 1px solid var(--border-bright);
  padding: .4rem 1rem; border-radius: 100px; margin-bottom: 2rem;
}
.cta-badge .blink {
  width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%;
  background: var(--green-core);
  animation: blink 1.1s step-end infinite;
}

.cta-heading {
  font-family: var(--font-display) !important;
  font-size: clamp(2rem,5vw,3.8rem) !important;
  font-weight: 800 !important;
  color: var(--text-primary) !important;
  letter-spacing: -.02em;
  margin: 0 auto 1rem !important; max-width: 20ch;
  position: relative; z-index: 1;
}

.cta-body {
  font-family: var(--font-body);
  font-size: 1.05rem; color: var(--text-muted);
  max-width: 48ch; margin: 0 auto 2.5rem;
  line-height: 1.65; position: relative; z-index: 1;
}

.cta-actions {
  display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 1rem;
  justify-content: center; position: relative; z-index: 1;
}

/* ── RESPONSIVE ── */
@media(max-width:640px) {
  .modules-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .hero { padding: 4rem 1.5rem 3rem; }
  .path-step { flex-direction: column; gap: .8rem; }
}

/* ── ENTRANCE ANIMATIONS ── */
.fade-up {
  opacity: 0;
  animation: fadeUp .6s ease forwards;
}
.fade-up:nth-child(1) { animation-delay: .1s; }
.fade-up:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: .2s; }
.fade-up:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: .3s; }
.fade-up:nth-child(4) { animation-delay: .4s; }

@keyframes fadeUp {
  from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(24px); }
  to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
}
</style>

<div class="linux-page">

<!-- ══════════════ HERO ══════════════ -->
<section class="hero">
  <div class="hero-eyebrow">Enterprise Linux Training</div>

  <h1>
    Master<br>
    <span class="accent">Linux</span> &<br>
    <span class="rhel">RHEL</span>
  </h1>

  <p class="hero-sub">
    From your first terminal command to managing production-grade
    Red Hat servers — a curriculum built for sysadmins who mean business.
  </p>

  <div class="terminal-prompt">
    <span class="prompt-user">you</span><span style="color:var(--text-dim)">@</span><span class="prompt-host">rhel9</span>
    <span class="prompt-path">~/career $</span>
    <span class="prompt-cmd">enroll --course linux-admin</span>
    <span class="cursor"></span>
  </div>

  <div class="hero-cta">
    <a href="/contact.qmd" class="btn-enroll">Enroll Now</a>
    <a href="#modules" class="btn-outline">View Curriculum</a>
  </div>

  <!-- Floating stats -->
  <div class="hero-stats">
    <div class="stat-chip">
      <span class="stat-num">4</span>
      <span class="stat-label">Core Modules</span>
    </div>
    <div class="stat-chip">
      <span class="stat-num">RHCSA</span>
      <span class="stat-label">Cert Aligned</span>
    </div>
    <div class="stat-chip">
      <span class="stat-num">∞</span>
      <span class="stat-label">Lab Access</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ══════════════ TOOLS STRIP ══════════════ -->
<div class="tools-strip">
  <div class="tools-label">Technologies &amp; Tools Covered</div>
  <div class="tools-row">
    <span class="tool-pill"><span class="dot"></span>RHEL 9</span>
    <span class="tool-pill"><span class="dot"></span>systemd</span>
    <span class="tool-pill"><span class="dot"></span>dnf / rpm</span>
    <span class="tool-pill"><span class="dot"></span>SELinux</span>
    <span class="tool-pill"><span class="dot"></span>firewalld</span>
    <span class="tool-pill"><span class="dot"></span>LVM</span>
    <span class="tool-pill"><span class="dot"></span>Bash Scripting</span>
    <span class="tool-pill"><span class="dot"></span>SSH / OpenSSH</span>
    <span class="tool-pill"><span class="dot"></span>Cron / at</span>
    <span class="tool-pill"><span class="dot"></span>NFS / Samba</span>
    <span class="tool-pill"><span class="dot"></span>grub2</span>
    <span class="tool-pill"><span class="dot"></span>journalctl</span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ══════════════ MODULES ══════════════ -->
<section class="section-wrap" id="modules">
  <div class="section-label">Curriculum</div>
  <h2 class="section-heading">Four Core Modules</h2>
  <p class="section-sub">
    Each module builds on the last — from foundational CLI fluency to
    automated, production-hardened server management.
  </p>

  <div class="modules-grid">

    <div class="module-card mod-1 fade-up" data-num="01">
      <div class="mod-icon">🐧</div>
      <span class="mod-tag">Module 01</span>
      <div class="mod-title">Linux Fundamentals</div>
      <p class="mod-desc">
        Build unshakeable foundations. Navigate the filesystem hierarchy,
        master permissions and ownership, and get comfortable with the
        terminal before diving deeper.
      </p>
      <div class="mod-topics">
        <span class="mod-topic">CLI navigation</span>
        <span class="mod-topic">chmod / chown</span>
        <span class="mod-topic">Filesystem Hierarchy</span>
        <span class="mod-topic">Processes &amp; Signals</span>
        <span class="mod-topic">vim / nano</span>
        <span class="mod-topic">Pipelines</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="module-card mod-2 fade-up" data-num="02">
      <div class="mod-icon">🔴</div>
      <span class="mod-tag">Module 02</span>
      <div class="mod-title">Red Hat System Administration</div>
      <p class="mod-desc">
        Go deep on RHEL 9. Master package management, user and group
        administration, systemd service control, and storage provisioning
        with LVM.
      </p>
      <div class="mod-topics">
        <span class="mod-topic">dnf / rpm</span>
        <span class="mod-topic">useradd / groupmod</span>
        <span class="mod-topic">systemctl</span>
        <span class="mod-topic">LVM &amp; Partitioning</span>
        <span class="mod-topic">journalctl</span>
        <span class="mod-topic">grub2</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="module-card mod-3 fade-up" data-num="03">
      <div class="mod-icon">🛡️</div>
      <span class="mod-tag">Module 03</span>
      <div class="mod-title">Security &amp; Networking</div>
      <p class="mod-desc">
        Lock down your servers. Configure firewalld zones, write and audit
        SELinux policies, and establish hardened SSH access for safe remote
        administration.
      </p>
      <div class="mod-topics">
        <span class="mod-topic">firewalld</span>
        <span class="mod-topic">SELinux policies</span>
        <span class="mod-topic">SSH hardening</span>
        <span class="mod-topic">PAM</span>
        <span class="mod-topic">auditd</span>
        <span class="mod-topic">fail2ban</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="module-card mod-4 fade-up" data-num="04">
      <div class="mod-icon">⚙️</div>
      <span class="mod-tag">Module 04</span>
      <div class="mod-title">Automation &amp; Scripting</div>
      <p class="mod-desc">
        Stop clicking and start scripting. Write robust Bash scripts to
        automate routine admin tasks, handle errors gracefully, and deploy
        servers with speed and consistency.
      </p>
      <div class="mod-topics">
        <span class="mod-topic">Bash scripting</span>
        <span class="mod-topic">cron &amp; at</span>
        <span class="mod-topic">Functions &amp; Arrays</span>
        <span class="mod-topic">Error handling</span>
        <span class="mod-topic">Heredocs</span>
        <span class="mod-topic">Logging</span>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</section>

<!-- ══════════════ LEARNING PATH ══════════════ -->
<section class="path-section">
  <div class="section-wrap">
    <div class="section-label">Learning Path</div>
    <h2 class="section-heading">Your Roadmap to RHCSA</h2>
    <p class="section-sub">
      A structured, no-fluff progression from zero to certified Red Hat
      System Administrator.
    </p>

    <div class="path-timeline">

      <div class="path-step">
        <span class="step-num">01</span>
        <div class="step-connector"><div class="step-dot"></div></div>
        <div class="step-body">
          <div class="step-title">Set Up Your Lab Environment</div>
          <div class="step-detail">Install RHEL 9 in a VM or spin up a cloud instance. Learn how to access the terminal, configure a static IP, and navigate your first shell session.</div>
          <div class="step-duration">⏱ Week 1 — ~6 hrs</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="path-step">
        <span class="step-num">02</span>
        <div class="step-connector"><div class="step-dot"></div></div>
        <div class="step-body">
          <div class="step-title">CLI Fluency &amp; Filesystem Mastery</div>
          <div class="step-detail">Get comfortable with file operations, searching, redirection, and permissions. Practice with real-world scenarios, not contrived exercises.</div>
          <div class="step-duration">⏱ Weeks 2–3 — ~10 hrs</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="path-step">
        <span class="step-num">03</span>
        <div class="step-connector"><div class="step-dot"></div></div>
        <div class="step-body">
          <div class="step-title">RHEL Administration Deep-Dive</div>
          <div class="step-detail">Manage packages, users, services, and storage. Configure a multi-disk LVM layout and understand how RHEL boots and recovers.</div>
          <div class="step-duration">⏱ Weeks 4–6 — ~16 hrs</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="path-step">
        <span class="step-num">04</span>
        <div class="step-connector"><div class="step-dot"></div></div>
        <div class="step-body">
          <div class="step-title">Harden &amp; Automate Your Server</div>
          <div class="step-detail">Apply SELinux policies, configure a stateful firewall, and write Bash automation scripts that run reliably in production.</div>
          <div class="step-duration">⏱ Weeks 7–9 — ~12 hrs</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="path-step step-cert">
        <span class="step-num">✦</span>
        <div class="step-connector"><div class="step-dot"></div></div>
        <div class="step-body">
          <div class="step-title">RHCSA Exam Ready</div>
          <div class="step-detail">Complete timed mock exams that mirror the real EX200. Get personalised feedback and targeted revision until you're exam-confident.</div>
          <div class="step-duration">🏆 Week 10 — Exam Simulation</div>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ══════════════ CTA ══════════════ -->
<section class="cta-section">
  <div class="cta-badge"><span class="blink"></span> Enrolment Open</div>
  <h2 class="cta-heading">Ready to Own the Command Line?</h2>
  <p class="cta-body">
    Join professionals who've levelled up their Linux skills with a
    curriculum built by practitioners, not theorists.
  </p>
  <div class="cta-actions">
    <a href="/contact.qmd" class="btn-enroll">Start Learning</a>
    <a href="/contact.qmd" class="btn-outline">Talk to an Advisor</a>
  </div>
</section>

</div>
```
